page_metadata.biotools__summary: DCHap is a fast and accurate haplotype phasing tool for third-generation sequencing data. It works for both SMRT reads (PacBio) and Oxford Nanopore reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DCHap is a fast and accurate haplotype phasing tool for third-generation sequencing data. It works for both SMRT reads (PacBio) and Oxford Nanopore reads.
